intro: What I'm currently building, running, and shipping. Updated when the work changes, not on a schedule.
building: Rebuilding [keithrobrien.com](https://keithrobrien.com) on Next.js 16 with TinaCMS, so I can publish without touching code. Working on MCP servers and tools that take the manual edges off the Total Emphasis ghostwriting pipeline.
running: Total Emphasis content strategy programs for several B2B clients. [141 Miles](https://www.141miles.com), a Jersey Shore events site with an AI-written newsletter. [The Diffraction](https://www.thediffraction.com), a music publication.
elsewhere: Reading on operator-builders and AI agent design. Trying to stay on the soccer pitch and lower my golf handicap.
